description_long: This is an ornate chandelier-style sconce featuring six upward-curving arms, each holding a candle-shaped light bulb with a cream-colored tip. The central column is turned and sculpted, giving the fixture a classic, vintage appearance. The arms are elegantly curved and finished in a matte white, with scalloped bobeches beneath each bulb for added decorative flair. The fixture is suspended from a dark metal chain and canopy, which contrasts with the lighter body. The overall design is symmetrical, with each arm evenly spaced around the central column. The sconce exudes a traditional, rustic charm suitable for upscale urban interiors or historic settings.
description: A vintage chandelier-style sconce with six candle-shaped bulbs, ornate white arms, and a dark metal chain suspension. The design is classic and decorative, with scalloped details and a rustic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six arms and bulbs, with the central column and chain clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the symmetry of the bulb arrangement.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the depth of the arms and the scalloped bobeches beneath each bulb.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view showing the back curvature of the arms and the attachment to the central column.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture features a vintage, rustic design with ornate, turned wood elements and elegantly curved arms. Its classic chandelier form and scalloped bobeches evoke traditional European influences.
